metadata.title: (I Just) Died In Your Arms (Extended Remix)
metadata.lyrics:
[00:15.14] Oh I, I just died in your arms tonight
[00:21.11] It must have been something you said
[00:24.45] I just died in your arms tonight
[00:30.86] 
[00:38.80] I keep looking for something I can't get
[00:43.18] Broken hearts lie all around me
[00:45.86] And I don't see an easy way to get out of this
[00:53.78] Her diary it sits on the bedside table
[00:57.54] The curtains are closed, the cats in the cradle
[01:01.38] Who would've thought that a boy like me could come to this
[01:07.62] Oh I, I just died in your arms tonight
[01:14.86] It must've been something you said
[01:18.16] I just died in your arms tonight
[01:22.91] Oh I, I just died in your arms tonight
[01:30.15] It must've been some kind of kiss
[01:33.95] I should've walked away, I should've walked away
[01:41.98] 
[01:51.03] Is there any just cause for feeling like this?
[01:55.88] On the surface I'm a name on a list
[01:58.44] I try to be discreet, but then blow it again
[02:06.19] I've lost and found, it's my final mistake
[02:10.22] She's loving by proxy, no give and all take
[02:14.04] 'cos I've been thrilled to fantasy one too many times
[02:20.48] Oh I, I just died in your arms tonight
[02:27.75] It must've been something you said
[02:31.03] I just died in your arms tonight
[02:36.73] Oh I, I just died in your arms tonight
[02:43.08] It must've been some kind of kiss
[02:46.85] I should've walked away, I should've walked away
[02:52.85] It was a long hot night
[02:56.07] And she made it easy, she made it feel right
[03:00.72] But now it's over, the moment has gone
[03:04.11] I followed my hands not my head, I know I was wrong
[03:10.69] 
[03:23.51] Oh I, I just died in your arms tonight,
[03:29.04] It must've been something you said,
[03:32.46] I just died in your arms tonight
[03:38.82] I, I just died in your arms tonight,
